commit.message:
Add passthrough:/// and SkipDialSettingsValidation to client options (#8)

Without SPANNER_EMULATOR_HOST set, the Spanner client library doesn't add
the passthrough:/// prefix or skip dial settings validation. Since spanemuboost
connects via emu.URI() without setting the env var, the fix from
googleapis/google-cloud-go#10947 is bypassed.

Currently the auth layer uses grpc.DialContext (passthrough by default), so
this is not actively triggered, but it will regress when the auth layer
migrates to grpc.NewClient (dns resolver by default).

Changes:
- Add passthrough:/// prefix to endpoint in defaultClientOpts()
- Add internaloption.SkipDialSettingsValidation() (required by passthrough:///)
- Delegate Emulator.ClientOptions() to defaultClientOpts() to avoid duplication
- Update test assertion from 3 to 4 options

This aligns with the pattern used by Spanner, Bigtable, and Datastore SDKs
for their emulator paths.

Fixes #7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
iMessage-style keyboard: keep input above keyboard, don't dismiss

Two changes:
1. Keyboard stays open after sending (removed blurOnMobile)
2. Container tracks visualViewport with both height AND offsetTop

When iOS keyboard opens, visualViewport shrinks and offsetTop increases.
The app container (position:fixed) follows both values via JS, so it
exactly fills the visible area above the keyboard. The flex layout
inside naturally shrinks the chat-window while keeping the input
pinned at the bottom — just like iMessage.

Smart ship/module management: protected routines, location-aware upgrades, module fit checks

- Protected routines (ship_upgrade, refit, return_home) can't be interrupted by Commander
- Bots track owned ship locations and travel to parked ships for switches
- Smart ship purchasing: find shipyard selling target class, travel there to buy
- Remote module purchasing: search cached markets cross-station, travel to buy
- Module fit pre-checks (CPU/power capacity) before buy/install, with swap awareness
- Bot profile shows owned ships with stats and "Use This Ship" button
- Manual page formats ship extra fields properly (build_time, flavor_tags, etc.)
- Disable generic faction chat spam (postFactionChatUpdate)
- Wire maxTokens config, session store persistence
- Catalog cache auto-invalidates when missing cpuCost/powerCost fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix ingest.py stdout pollution breaking MCP JSON-RPC communication

MCP uses stdout as the transport for JSON-RPC messages. Any print() to
stdout causes the MCP client to fail parsing. Redirect all ingest logging
to stderr via a _log() helper.

commit.message:
fix: resolve web build errors and failing tests

- Fix NotificationService tests: mock `.save()` instead of `.update()` to match
  actual implementation (service uses TypeORM save, not update)
- Remove server-only exports from @careequity/core barrel file:
  - AIModerator (uses TensorFlow - not browser compatible)
  - logger (uses winston/fs - not browser compatible)
- Update review.service.ts to import AIModerator directly from module path

These changes allow Next.js Turbopack to build without trying to bundle
Node.js-only dependencies like TensorFlow and winston into client bundles.

commit.message:
Add trailing stop-loss system for profit protection

- New update_trailing_stops() in pipeline.py, called every 5min before stop-loss checks
- Activates after 2% favorable move, trails at max(1x ATR, 1.5% of price)
- Direction-aware: longs trail up, shorts trail down, never moves backward
- Preserves original_stop_loss_price for reference
- Telegram alert on first activation per position
- Event bus integration for dashboard updates
- Config: trailing_stop_activation_pct, trailing_stop_distance_pct, trailing_stop_atr_mult
- 26 new tests (345 total), all passing

commit.message:
fix: Implement persistent data storage & proper tab navigation

ISSUES FIXED:
1. Settings tabs don't toggle/highlight active state when navigating
   - Fixed: Detect active tab from URL pathname using usePathname()
   - Visual feedback: Active tab now shows border-[#00F0A0] and bg-green-50

2. Data reverts to defaults on page refresh (only Profile persisted)
   - Fixed: Channels endpoint now saves whatsappPhone, telegramBotName to database
   - Fixed: Notifications endpoint now saves preferences as JSON to database
   - Billing endpoint already working (saves plan to userProfile)

IMPLEMENTATION:
- Added fields to UserProfile: whatsappPhone, whatsappVerified, telegramBotName, telegramVerified, notificationPrefs
- Updated channels/route.ts: Save/load phone and bot name from database
- Updated notifications/route.ts: Persist preferences as JSON in notificationPrefs field
- Updated settings/page.tsx: Detect active tab from URL pathname, improved styling
- All changes build successfully with zero TypeScript errors

MIGRATION:
- Schema updated with new fields (notificationPrefs is JSON type)
- Migration file created, will auto-run on Vercel deployment
- No breaking changes to existing data

DATA PERSISTENCE FLOW:
1. User connects WhatsApp → POST channels with phoneNumber
2. API saves to userProfile.whatsappPhone + whatsappVerified
3. User navigates away and returns
4. GET channels fetches from database, shows connected status
5. Same pattern for Telegram, Notifications, and Billing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: YouTube audio-only, remove video overlay, update progress UX

YouTube is an audio appliance feature — no video rendering:
- Default audio_only=True, always is_video=False
- Remove video layout from QML NowPlaying (SA/VU shows like other sources)
- Remove video chrome auto-hide, fullscreen toggle, geometry reporting
- Remove video settings (resolution, audio-only toggle) from web remote

Update system improvements:
- Forced updates stop kiosk/bridge immediately (playback stops)
  but keep streamerd alive for WS progress broadcasts
- Broadcast progress steps: downloading, backing up, installing,
  updating deps, running setup, restarting
- Web remote shows live progress via WS 'updating' messages
- Child start order: kiosk/bridge first, streamerd last (web remote
  only reconnects once display is already running)

Fix map and FP view orientation to match player perspective

- simToGridRotated: use proper right/forward vector decomposition
  (right = sinY·dx - cosY·dy, forward = cosY·dx + sinY·dy)
- Terrain sampling inverse rotation corrected to match
- Compass labels and edge indicators use same decomposition
- Raycaster fan-out: pcol=0 → left (yaw+HALF_FOV), pcol=max → right
- worldToScreen: use atan2-based angle offset for consistent projection

commit.message:
feat(sidebar): show keyboard shortcuts panel when no image is loaded (#20)

This pull request introduces a new `KeyboardShortcutsPanel` component to
display keyboard shortcuts when no image is loaded, and makes the
shortcuts data reusable. The main changes focus on improving user
guidance and code reuse.

User interface enhancements:

* Added the `KeyboardShortcutsPanel` component, which displays a table
of keyboard shortcuts and their descriptions using translations, and
renders it in the sidebar when no image is loaded
(`src/components/KeyboardShortcutsPanel.tsx`, `src/App.tsx`).
[[1]](diffhunk://#diff-fbec859caa9ec6b50b6546fc9e425a15cd4beb0537e81c977461e0ed8585c4a6R1-R26)
[[2]](diffhunk://#diff-26ad4b834941d9b19ebf9db8082bd202aaf72ea0ddea85f5a8a0cb3c729cc6f2R5)
[[3]](diffhunk://#diff-26ad4b834941d9b19ebf9db8082bd202aaf72ea0ddea85f5a8a0cb3c729cc6f2R118)

Code reuse improvements:

* Exported the `shortcuts` array from `KeyboardShortcutsHelp.tsx` to
allow it to be shared with the new panel component
(`src/components/KeyboardShortcutsHelp.tsx`).

feat: Phase 1 — 証言シャッフル＋矛盾ランダム配置（Lv.2）

- CriminalAI: generate_testimony_set() 追加。フェーズ冒頭にAIが
  証言をシャッフル・矛盾を埋め込んだJSONを生成。最大3回リトライ、
  失敗時はskeletonのgistをフォールバックとして使用。
- CourtState: contradiction_maps でフェーズ毎の証言セットを管理。
  is_using_ai_testimony() でAI/フォールバックを切り替え。
- CheckpointJudge: judge(evidence_id) に統一。AI証言時は
  contains_checkpoint、フォールバック時は is_checkpoint で判定。
  wrong_target（証拠正解・証言不正解）はライフ減少なし。
- Court: _testimony_cache 廃止。証言をcontradiction_mapから表示。
  wrong_target 時に裁判長ヒントを表示。
- .gitignore: docs/ を追加（要件書をGitHub非公開化）。
